titleStmt.title: SII 30.263: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 263. (A.R. No. 615 of 1915.) Pāṟaippaṭṭi, Ottapidaram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On a rock called Eḻuttuppāṟai in the village Jat. Daṉmaperumāḷ, Aḻagapperumāḷ, Ativīrarāmaṉ, Sīvalamāraṉ, ‘one who recovered the past’ Ativīrarāmaṉ: Saka 15[17], Maṉmatha, Vaigāsi, 11: 15[95] A.D.

summary.p: It registers a tax-free grant of land to certain individuals named Muppūsi Veruṅkāli nāyakkar, Muppūsi Sindhaya nāyakkar, Muppūsi [Ramasiya] nāyakkar, Muppūsi Liṅgaya nāyakkar and Muppūsi Machchaya nāyakkar. This grant was issued during the reign of the Vijayanagar ruler Vēnkaṭapatirāya. The names of the ruler's ancestors such as Dēvarāya, Krishṇarāya, Sadāsivarāya, Vīra-Narasimharāya, Dharmarāya and Sriraṅgarāya and a string of birudās are also mentioned. The rock on which this inscription is engraved is called Ūsippāṟai at Taṭṭāṉ kiṇaṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Ariyarāvi
pāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāya kaṇṭaṉ muvarāya
ra kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu
kuṭātāṉ pāṇṭimaṇṭalat tāpaṉācāriyaṉ
coḻamaṇṭala piratiṭṭāṉācāriyaṉ pu
ruppa teṣaṇa Uttira camuttira Īḷamum ko
ṅkum yāppāṇāyaṉRead- yāḻppāṇampaṭṭaṇamum ticai
veṭṭai koṇṭaruḷiya Irācā
ti Irācā Irācaparamecuraṉ Irāyanā
ṟāyaṇaṉ rāyarpayaṅkaraṉ I
rāyapayaṅkaraṉ Irāyar maṇavā
ḻaṉ Irāyar teyventiraṉ koṭi
nāṟāyaṇaṉ śrīmaṉ vīrappiratāpaṉ ve
ṟṟippiratāpaṉ kīrttippiratāpaṉ Etka
ḻamum koṇṭa mahaārāyarāya Irāyaṉ Irāca
kuṇarāmaṉ kacapatirāyaṉ narapatirāyaṉ I
rākattaṉ tammarāṉa Antam pirakaṇṭaṉ
virattaḷa culuttaṉ keṭumaṉṉiya kaṇṭaṉ
Orukuṭaikkīḻ Ulakamuḻutāḷvoṉ tuṭṭa
nil tuṭṭaṉ tuṭṭar mokan taviḷttāṉ Aṭṭa
yyakaraṉ metiṉimīsarakaṇṭaṉ ka
ṭāri Irāyaṉ rāyakaṇṭakatti malaikalaṅkiṉu
maṉaṅkalaṅkātāṉ Acupati Irāyaṉ teyvarāyar ma
kārāyar kiṣṇarāyar catācivarāyar vīra naraciṅkarāyar
piṭārāyar taṉmarāyar śrīraṅkarāyar veṅkaṭapati Irā
yar vicayat tirumaṇi vicayaciṅkācaṉattil Iruntu piru
tivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāy niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 5 100
mel cellāniṉṟa ciri koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa kone
rimaikoṇṭāṉ tiripuvaṉaccakkirapattikaḷil perumā
ḷ taṉmapperumāḷ Aḻakapperumāḷ Ativīrarāma
ṉ civilamāraṉ Iṟantakālameṭutta Ativīrarāmaṉ paṇṭā
rattil tiruvirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa maṉmata
vaiykāci 10 1 śrīmat piṭṭattuṟai timmarācar timmaracar
muppuci veruṅkāli nāyakkarukku muppuccintaiya
nāyakkarukku muppuciṟāmaciya nāyakkarukku muppuci Iliṅka
ya nāyakkarukkum muppuci maccaya nāyakkarukkum muppuca
vārukkellām paṉṉuvaka Iṟai Illāmal caṟuva
māṉiyappaṭṭaiyaṅ kuṭuttom Intappaṭikku can
tirātittaṉ varaiyum cantatippiravecamuḷḷa maṭ
ṭum kallum kāveriyum pullu pūmiyumuḷḷa ma
ṭṭum caṟuvamāṉiyamāka keṭṭamai Iṭṭom I
tukku yātāmmoruttar Akitam niṉaittāl ke
ṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa
(ṟa) pāvattileyum Eḻu pirāmaṇaraiyum koṉṟa
pāvattileyum pokakkaṭavārākavum In=tappa
ṭikku cāṭci navacilla vīrappanāyakkar Eṟayāt
ti cintammanāyakkar vallaccakkaiya nāyakatti
le kāṭṭi In=tappaṭi I taṭṭāṉkiṇattu
Ūcippāṟaiyile kalveṭṭik kuṭutto
m Itu Iyātāmoruttaṉ Akitam niṉait
tāl mātāpitāvaik koṉṟavaṉ pāvatti
le pokakkaṭavārākavum In=tappaṭi
timmarācar colpaṭi veṭai veṅkāttāṉ
Aḻakaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 30.263 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
